backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to their associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for the InternBridge application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each page and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the InternBridge app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that wraps the app in AuthProvider and ToastProvider, seeds localStorage on mount, and implements state-based routing across all 10 pages using a navigate helper.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationModa: Reusable confirmation dialog component built on shadcn AlertDialog that supports customizable title, message, button labels, and a destructive style variant.
frontend/src/components/InternshipCard.t: Card component displaying internship details (company, role, work type, duration, stipend, skills) with an Apply button visible only to logged-in students that disables when already applied.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive sticky navbar with a logo, desktop navigation links, and a hamburger menu for mobile; shows user name/role and a logout button when authenticated, or Login/Register links when not.
frontend/src/components/StatusPill.tsx: Small presentational component that renders a styled pill badge for one of four application statuses: applied, under_review, accepted, or rejected.
frontend/src/components/Toast.tsx: Toast notification system providing a ToastContext with a showToast function; renders auto-dismissing, color-coded toast messages in the bottom-right corner with icons for success, error, warning, and info types.
frontend/src/components/VerificationBadg: A React component that renders a styled badge with an icon and label for four verification statuses: verified, pending, rejected, and more_info.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides a React authentication context with login/logout functions and current user state persisted to localStorage, exposing a useAuth hook.
frontend/src/data/assessmentQuestions.ts: Exports a static dataset of multiple-choice assessment questions organized by skill (Excel, SQL, Power BI), each with 5 questions and a correct answer index.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor via React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validity.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a blue-indigo theme (light and dark), and reusable utility classes for badges, gradients, and status indicators.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays stats and tabbed management views for students, recruiters, and documents, with actions to update verification and certificate statuses stored in local seed data.
frontend/src/pages/Applications.tsx: Displays a list of internship applications for the current user; students see their own applications with status pills, while recruiters see applications grouped by their posted internships and can update application statuses.
frontend/src/pages/Assessment.tsx: Provides a skill assessment quiz flow (select skill → answer questions → view results) for students, saving scores to their profile in localStorage via seedData utilities.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing/marketing page showcasing platform features, statistics, and call-to-action buttons directing users to search internships or register as a recruiter.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with two tabs (Student/Recruiter and Admin) that authenticates users against localStorage seed data and redirects them to their respective dashboards.
frontend/src/pages/RecruiterDashboard.ts: Multi-section recruiter dashboard allowing recruiters to view their company profile, verification status, post new internships, manage existing postings, and review/update applicant statuses.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Registration page with tabbed forms for students and recruiters, including field validation, skill selection, file uploads (photo/resume), and localStorage persistence via seedData utilities.
frontend/src/pages/SearchInternships.tsx: Internship search page that filters listings by text query and work type, and allows authenticated students to apply to internships, storing applications in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx: Student dashboard with sidebar navigation covering profile editing, skills, documents, skill assessments, internship search, and application tracking, all backed by localStorage data.
frontend/src/utils/fileHelpers.ts: Utility that exposes a single `fileToBase64` function converting a File object to a base64 data URL using FileReader.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for Students, Recruiters, Internships, Applications, and Certificates, and provides localStorage-backed CRUD helpers along with initial seed data for development.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, brand colors, shadows, border radii, and animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Defines the full project state for InternBridge, a single-file React SPA with localStorage persistence, three user roles, and features including internship posting, skill assessments, and admin verification. Contains architectural notes, known issues, image requirements, and a detailed list of existing features with versioning.
